test_cases.title: Verify blood pressure measurement boundary limits
test_cases.description: Verifies that the CT-200 blood pressure monitor displays an out-of-range error if pressure exceeds 300 mmHg.
preconditions: Device is calibrated and powered on.
steps: Simulate cuff pressure rising to 310 mmHg.
test_cases.expected_result: Device shows Error Code 'E-2' on display and halts pump motor immediately.

test_cases.title: Verify low battery safety warning trigger
test_cases.description: Ensures a low battery indicator displays when battery voltage drops below 2.2V.
preconditions: DC voltage simulator source connected to battery terminals.
steps: Observe battery icon indicator status on screen.
test_cases.expected_result: Battery indicator icon flashes on LCD screen, and warning beep sounds twice.

test_cases.title: Verify measurement abort button interrupt
test_cases.description: Ensures the user can cancel measurement at any time during cuff inflation.
steps: Press start button to begin inflation.
While cuff is inflating, press the Power/Stop button.
Verify cuff deflation and motor status.
test_cases.expected_result: Inflation motor stops instantly, cuff releases pressure completely in under 2 seconds, screen shows 'OP-ERR'.

test_cases.title: Service Fallback - QA Generator Offline
test_cases.description: Automated fallback case generated due to LLM interface failure. Details: Gemini call failed: 404 models/gemini-1.5-flash is not found for API version v1beta, or is not supported for generateContent. Call ModelService.ListModels to see the list of available models and their supported methods.
preconditions: Gemini generation service experienced an error.
steps: Check that the GEMINI_API_KEY environment variable is configured and active.
Verify Gemini rate limits have not been exceeded.
test_cases.expected_result: Gemini service becomes available and successfully returns structured JSON test cases.
